entries.name: SV_Position
entries.documentation: Position in clip space or screen space.

entries.name: SV_VertexID
entries.documentation: Vertex index provided by the input assembler.

entries.name: SV_InstanceID
entries.documentation: Instance index provided by the input assembler.

entries.name: SV_PrimitiveID
entries.documentation: Primitive index for the current primitive.

entries.name: SV_SampleIndex
entries.documentation: MSAA sample index for the current sample.

entries.name: SV_IsFrontFace
entries.documentation: Boolean flag indicating whether the current primitive is front-facing.

entries.name: SV_DispatchThreadID
entries.documentation: Global thread ID in dispatch space.

entries.name: SV_GroupID
entries.documentation: Thread group ID in dispatch space.

entries.name: SV_GroupThreadID
entries.documentation: Thread ID within the current thread group.

entries.name: SV_GroupIndex
entries.documentation: Linear thread index within the current thread group.
